notes: Copy this file to config/ip_addresses.json (already gitignored — never commit real credentials). 'profile' is the Wisenet RTSP sub-stream: profile1 is the main/high-res stream, profile2 is the lower-res sub-stream (recommended for frequent snapshot bursts). 'location_id' should match one of the location ids in config/dashboard_map.json so the dashboard map can highlight where the live camera is. Only the first camera entry is used today (single live test camera); additional entries are ignored until multi-camera support is added.
